message:
🐛 Fix tab restore, tile focus, and rocket scroll (#142)

- Restore active tab correctly after page refresh (activeTabIdRef)
- Auto-focus tile matches restored activeTabId instead of first checked
- Add WriteThrottler to batch rapid terminal output at ~60fps,
  preventing agent CLI rocket scroll while keeping low-latency feel
- Throttle wheel events in capture phase (32ms) to tame macOS trackpad
  momentum scrolling in both single and tile modes
- Remove debug logging

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
